title: Chapter 9
content:
Chapter 9: Chapter 9: Confession [18+]

Along the way to Ariel’s place, as Damon passed the people around couldn’t help but to stare at Damon.

A young man with handsome face, dressed in black with wooden sword on his waist. It was a sight that attract everyone eyes. He could hear them murmuring around him.

"Kyaa! Look at him, he was so handsome. Which clan do you think that young master belongs to?" A young woman whispered to her friend.

"You’re right, he really handsome. If my future husband is even a half handsome as he is, I’ll consider myself lucky."

"He must be heading for the Azure Dragon Sect selection. Based on his aura, he already at the Sixth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm at his age, I’d give anything for that kind of talent."

"Why is he carrying a wooden sword instead a real one?"

Damon ignores the voice around him, even though he could hear every word they spoke.

’Ha. They haven’t the faintest idea. This is no ordinary wooden sword. It’s stronger than steel. With my sword qi running through it, it’ll hit as hard as any Spirit Grade Weapon.’

He continued toward his destination without breaking stride.

****

Arriving at the inn from the previous day, he looked the building over properly for the first time. It rose tall before him. Less like an inn and more like something out of a grand hotel back on Earth. He hadn’t noticed yesterday.

He walked inside and move toward one of the service desks.

"Good morning, Sir. How may I help you?" the attendant greeted him with a smile.

"I want to know where room Lady Aquaria is staying in. I have an appointment with her."

"Ah... Young Master Damon, I presume?" She gave him a bright smile.

"Yes."

"Miss Aquaria informed us ahead of time. Her room is number two, fifth floor." She gestured toward the stair.

"Thank you." He turned around and immediately headed to the stairs. After climbing to the fifth floor and stop before the door marked with a two.

He then knocked the door.

"Lady Aquaria, it’s me. Damon."

The door slowly open. Ariel stood in front the doorway with her breathing ragged and her face flushed in deep red.

[Ariel’s Lust has increased by 50, +150 lust points!]

With took one look at her, Damon immediately knows what’s going on and smiled.

’She has been masturbating.’

"Co—come in."

He nodded and stepped inside. The moment he enters the room; he could feel a shift in the spiritual energy density in the room.

[Yin Qi detected. Would you like to absorb it?]

’So, this is Yin Qi... Later.’

"So, Lady Aquaria, what do you wanted to talk—"

Before he could finish his words, Ariel pushed him back to the bed and climbed on top of him, her hands pressed against his chest.

"What did you do to me?"

"What do you mean?" Damon asks back.

"Since yesterday, something has change with my body. Ever since that happened, it keeps...-sniff...craving more." Her voice faltered, and slowly the anger gave way to quiet sobbing.

"I-I even tried to touch-sniff... myself, but it felt nothing like when you touched me. It’s been driving me mad."

"E-ever since I met you, my heart won’t stop racing. When you’re not in front of me, your face keeps- sniff... surfacing in my mind. My body wants your hands on it. Nothing like this has ever happened to me before. I don’t understand what’s going on anymore-sniff...." She was on the verge of breaking apart entirely.

’So, this is what the Incubus ability does, makes a woman crave its touch. Or perhaps, given how sheltered she is, the effect way stronger than I anticipated.’

"Lady Aquaria, what you’re feeling... could it be love?" Damon said told her

"Love? As in caring for someone?"

"Yes. You keep wanting to see me, right? To be touched by me. To stay by my side."

Ariel gave him a small nod.

"That’s your answer, then. You started to love me."

"So, what am I supposed to do now?"

"Simple." He smiled. "Become my woman."

"B-but as a young lady of the Aquaria Family, I—"

Before she could finish, Damon pushed him upper body upright, pull her into his lap and kissed her.

"Mghhn~!" The sudden kiss sent electricity through her whole body, she could feel a warmth rising from her chest.

When the surprise faded. She leaned into it and began returning the kiss. After a few moment, they lip separated.

"Okay..." Ariel nodded with her cheeks blushed and lips curved into a small smile. She still didn’t fully understand what she was feeling, but she followed it anyway.

[Ariel’s Interest increased by 50, +150 lust points!]

Damon’s smile grew wider at her answer.

’You’re mine now.’

"You want to feel what you felt yesterday? And more?"

She nodded without hesitation. He lay her back against the bed.

Then he kissed her again, while one hand moving to her chest, and his fingers slowly kneading the soft mound there.

"Mghhn~! Ahhn~!" A moan escaped from Ariel’s mouth the moment his touch meets her.

He undressed her slowly, until she lay naked before him, her modest curves, her pale and smooth skin, her two plump mounds on her chest with her rosy, pink nipple, and beautiful slit of her pussy.

Only when the cool air reached her did she realized, her hands move up try to cover herself.

"Kyaa—!"

Ignoring her startled cry, Damon began undressing himself. His sleeping dragon, freed at last from its constraints, rose to attention.

He reached down and took hold of the hands that shielding her private area, then leaned close and whispered into her ear.

"It’s alright. Just follow my lead, and you’ll feel good. You know what comes next, don’t you, Lady Aquaria?"

She nodded. "If this is what it means to be your woman," Ariel said, her smile soft and disarming, "then I want it. Also... Just call me Ariel."

"Ariel," Damon called her name softly.

He moved over her, his weight pressing between her thighs. His Incubus Eyes activated, and a scatter of red dots spread across her body.

His mouth moved to one of the points on her nipple, lips grazing the pink bud before sucking gently at her nipple. Ariel’s back bowed off the bed with a sharp intake of breath.

"Ahn~! That feels... good..."

He said nothing, letting his hands wander instead, his Incubus Touch transforming every stroke into pleasure. Her whole body trembled.

"Ahn~! Damon, please... I can’t hold it anymore...."

[Ariel’s Interest increased by 50, +150 lust points!]

[Ariel’s Lust reaches maximum, +300 lust points!]

[Ariel’s Interest reaches 100/100, new relationship level unlocked, +300 lust points!]

[Ariel’s Relationship change from Taking an Interest to In Love, +400 lust points!]

He positioned his cock in front of her pussy.

"Are you ready, Ariel?"

"Yes..."
